title: Pass only required config to handle_relay_event()
description:
At main.rs:125, handle_relay_event() takes &ResolvedBotConfig but uses only:
- config.on_message_hook
- config.relay

Passing the entire config object:
- Couples the relay event handler to unrelated config fields (insecure, self_test, keyfile, etc.)
- Makes unit testing harder (must construct full ResolvedBotConfig instead of just passing hooks)
- Hides the function's actual dependencies

Fix: Pass only the required fields:
  handle_relay_event(client_event, &conn_tx, on_message_hook: Option<&String>, relay_url: &str, my_pub_id).await;

Acceptance: handle_relay_event() signature no longer takes ResolvedBotConfig, unit test overhead reduced, function contract is clearer.
close_reason: deferred: handle_relay_event() receiving full config is acceptable for Phase 4f; minimize-params refactor belongs in Phase 4g
